purpose: Evaluate upstream extraction of generation-ready fact locks from new writing requests.

requests.request: Write a Facebook-style post about my smart coffee mug notifying me that the coffee is cold after I already finished drinking it.
Edit this draft for compression and meaningful quoted stance without changing its facts.
requests.source_text: I bought a robot vacuum that was marketed as "smart." It gets stuck under the same chair every time, and I am disappointed.

requests.context: An earlier fictional post established that Project Umbrella is an attempt to teach an umbrella to predict wind direction.
requests.request: Write a later Facebook-style update in which Project Umbrella reaches one new but useless milestone.
Write a brief message telling friends that Saturday dinner is canceled because a family member needs rest. Do not identify the family member or give medical details.
Write an exactly two-sentence notice explaining that a cache refresh will make the internal dashboard unavailable for three minutes.
